title: Music Pack Renewed
description: An music pack which replaces all of default background music to something new. Check description!
body: This pack is just my vision of the game. I tried to make game more like you play it first time to make you feel like you playing first time and hear the c418 music. All music is vanilla-friendly, no "non-atmospheric" tracks, at least I think. I **do not** owe music, all creators and their profiles on youtube are in COPYRIGHT.txt. Hope you like it and leave a comment what should I add in future updates :)
